calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Entire Case
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SEAL ENTIRE CASE as follows: Defendants' motion to seal "entire case" is DENIED. The motion fails to show that sealing the "entire case" is necessary to further the identified overriding interest/s. The motion therefore does not comply with the narrowly tailored requirement of CRC 2.550(d)(4) and (5). The court is obligated to follow the constraints of the CRC notwithstanding the parties' stipulation to seal the entire case. Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)
